children.heading: Distribution of information by Secretary concerned
children.label: a Distribution of information by Secretary concerned
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall issue to servicemembers information explaining the provisions of this subchapter.

children.heading: Application forms
children.label: b Application forms
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall provide application forms to servicemembers requesting relief under this subchapter.

children.heading: Information from Secretary of the Interior
children.label: c Information from Secretary of the Interior
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior shall furnish to the Secretary concerned information explaining the provisions of this subchapter (other than sections 3991, 4000, and 4001 of this title) and related application forms.
